title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Steven Goldfeder - User-Centric Interoperability
description:
In this talk, Steven Goldfeder (Offchain Labs, CEO) goes over Offchain Lab's work on interoperability for the Arbitrum and Ethereum ecosystems. It highlights the intent engine and their path to improving it.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
